description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Golden coloured earringsHas a floral base with white pearl like detail on the periphery and a green stone in the centre Circular dangler, has pearl like detail on the periphery, garnet coloured stone in the centre, hanging white bead with green and white bead detail on top Push back closure  Material and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 76 mm
